title: नवार्ण मन्त्र विधान
devanagariText:
॥ अथ श्रीनवार्णमन्त्रविधानम् ॥

ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे।

॥ विनियोगः ॥
ॐ अस्य श्रीनवार्णमन्त्रस्य ब्रह्मविष्णुरुद्रा ऋषयः।
गायत्र्युष्णिगनुष्टुभश्छन्दांसि। महालक्ष्मीमहासरस्वतीमहाकाल्यो देवताः।
ऐं बीजम्। ह्रीं शक्तिः। क्लीं कीलकम्। श्रीमहालक्ष्मीप्रीत्यर्थे जपे विनियोगः॥

॥ ऋष्यादि न्यासः ॥
ब्रह्मविष्णुरुद्र-ऋषिभ्यो नमः — शिरसि।
गायत्र्युष्णिगनुष्टुप्-छन्दोभ्यो नमः — मुखे।
महाकालीमहालक्ष्मीमहासरस्वती-देवताभ्यो नमः — हृदि।
ऐं बीजाय नमः — गुह्ये।
ह्रीं शक्तये नमः — पादयोः।
क्लीं कीलकाय नमः — नाभौ॥

॥ करन्यासः ॥
ऐं अंगुष्ठाभ्यां नमः।
ह्रीं तर्जनीभ्यां नमः।
क्लीं मध्यमाभ्यां नमः।
चा अनामिकाभ्यां नमः।
मुं कनिष्ठिकाभ्यां नमः।
डा करतलकरपृष्ठाभ्यां नमः॥

॥ हृदयादि न्यासः ॥
ऐं हृदयाय नमः।
ह्रीं शिरसे स्वाहा।
क्लीं शिखायै वषट्।
चामुण्डायै कवचाय हुम्।
विच्चे नेत्रत्रयाय वौषट्।
ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे अस्त्राय फट्॥

॥ ध्यानम् ॥
खड्गं चक्रगदेषुचापपरिघाञ्छूलं भुशुण्डीं शिरः
शंखं सन्दधतीं करैस्त्रिनयनां सर्वाङ्गभूषावृताम्।
नीलाश्मद्युतिमास्यपाददशकां सेवे महाकालिकां
यामस्तौत्स्वपिते हरौ कमलजो हन्तुं मधुं कैटभम्॥

अक्षस्रक्परशूं गदेषुकुलिशं पद्मं धनुः कुण्डिकां
दण्डं शक्तिमसिं च चर्म जलजं घण्टां सुराभाजनम्।
शूलं पाशसुदर्शने च दधतीं हस्तैः प्रसन्नाननां
सेवे सैरिभमर्दिनीमिह महालक्ष्मीं सरोजस्थिताम्॥

घण्टाशूलहलानि शंखमुसले चक्रं धनुः सायकं
हस्ताब्जैर्दधतीं घनान्तविलसच्छीतांशुतुल्यप्रभाम्।
गौरीदेहसमुद्भवां त्रिजगतामाधारभूतां
महापूर्वामत्र सरस्वतीमनुभजे शुम्भादिदैत्यार्दिनीम्॥

॥ जपविधिः ॥
ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे।

नियमः — प्रातःकाले स्नात्वा शुचिर्भूत्वा पूर्वाभिमुखो वा उत्तराभिमुखः
कुशासने वा ऊर्णासने उपविश्य।
स्फटिकमालया वा रुद्राक्षमालया वा जपेत्।
एकवारं न्यूनतमं १०८ जपेत्।
नवरात्रे प्रतिदिनं ९×१०८ = ९७२ जपो विशेषफलदः॥

ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे।
ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे।
ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे॥

॥ इति श्रीनवार्णमन्त्रविधानं सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Atha Shri Navarna Mantra Vidhanam ||

Om Aim Hreem Kleem Chaamundaayai Vichche.

|| Viniyogah ||
Om Asya Shri Navarna Mantrasya Brahma-Vishnu-Rudraa Rishayah.
Gaayatry-Ushni-Ganushtubbhas-Chhandaamsi. Mahaalakshmee-Mahaa-Saraswatee-Mahaakalyoo Devataah.
Aim Beejam. Hreem Shaktih. Kleem Keelakam. Shri Mahaalakshmee-Prityarthe Jape Viniyogah.

|| Rishyaadi Nyaasah ||
Brahma-Vishnu-Rudra-Rishibhyo Namah — Shirasi.
Gaayatry-Ushni-Ganushtup-Cchandobhyo Namah — Mukhe.
Mahaakalee-Mahaalakshmee-Mahaasaraswatee-Devaataabhyo Namah — Hridi.
Aim Beejaaya Namah — Guhye.
Hreem Shaktaye Namah — Paadayoh.
Kleem Keelakaaya Namah — Naabhau.

|| Karanyaasah ||
Aim Angushtthaabhyaam Namah.
Hreem Tarjaneebhyaam Namah.
Kleem Madhyamaabhyaam Namah.
Chaa Anaamikaabhyaam Namah.
Mum Kanishtthikaabhyaam Namah.
Daa Karatalakara-Prishthaabhyaam Namah.

|| Hridayaadi Nyaasah ||
Aim Hridayaaya Namah.
Hreem Shirase Svaahaa.
Kleem Shikhaayai Vashat.
Chaamundaayai Kavachaaya Hum.
Vichche Netratrayaaya Vaushat.
Aim Hreem Kleem Chaamundaayai Vichche Astraaya Phat.

|| Dhyaanam ||
Khadgam Chakragadeshuchaapaparighaan-Chhoolam Bhushundeem Shirah
Shankham Sandadhateem Karaih Trinayanaam Sarvaangabhooshaavritaam.
Neelaasmadyutim-Aasyapaaddashhakaam Seve Mahaakaalikaam
Yaamstautsvapite Harau Kamalajo Hantum Madhum Kaitabham.

Akshasrakparashoom Gadeshukullisham Padmam Dhanuh Kundikaam
Dandam Shaktim-Asim Cha Charma Jalajam Ghantaam Suraabaajanam.
Shoolam Paashasudardshane Cha Dadhateem Hastaih Prasannaananaam
Seve Sairibhamardineemiha Mahaalakshmeem Sarojasthitaam.

Ghantaashoolahalaani Shankhamusale Chakram Dhanuh Saayakam
Hastaabjairdadhateem Ghanaantavilasachchheetaamshutulya-Prabhaam.
Gauree-Deha-Samudbhavaam Trijagataam-Aadhaarabhootaam
Mahaaporvaamattra Sarasvateem-Anubhaje Shumbhaadidaityaardineem.

|| Japavidhih ||
Om Aim Hreem Kleem Chaamundaayai Vichche.

Niyamah — Praataahkaale Snaatvaa Shuchirbhootvaa Poorvaabhimukho Vaa Uttaraabhimukhah
Kushaasane Vaa Oornaasane Upavishya.
Sphatikamaalaayaa Vaa Rudraakshamaalaayaa Vaa Japet.
Ekavaaram Nyoonatamam 108 Japet.
Navaratre Pratidinam 9x108 = 972 Japo Visheshaphaladah.

Om Aim Hreem Kleem Chaamundaayai Vichche.
Om Aim Hreem Kleem Chaamundaayai Vichche.
Om Aim Hreem Kleem Chaamundaayai Vichche.

|| Iti Shri Navarna Mantra Vidhanam Sampoornam ||
hindiMeaning:
नवार्ण मन्त्र: ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे।

विनियोग: इस श्री नवार्ण मन्त्र के ब्रह्मा-विष्णु-रुद्र ऋषि हैं। गायत्री-उष्णिक्-अनुष्टुप् छन्द हैं। महालक्ष्मी-महासरस्वती-महाकाली देवता हैं। ऐं बीज है। ह्रीं शक्ति है। क्लीं कीलक है। श्री महालक्ष्मी प्रीत्यर्थ जप में विनियोग।

ऋष्यादि न्यास: ब्रह्मा-विष्णु-रुद्र ऋषियों को शिर पर नमस्कार। गायत्री-उष्णिक्-अनुष्टुप् छन्दों को मुख पर नमस्कार। महाकाली-महालक्ष्मी-महासरस्वती देवताओं को हृदय पर नमस्कार। ऐं बीज को गुह्य पर। ह्रीं शक्ति को पैरों पर। क्लीं कीलक को नाभि पर।

कर-न्यास: ऐं — अंगूठों पर। ह्रीं — तर्जनी पर। क्लीं — मध्यमा पर। चा — अनामिका पर। मुं — कनिष्ठिका पर। डा — करतल और करपृष्ठ पर।

हृदयादि न्यास: ऐं — हृदय को नमस्कार। ह्रीं — शिर को स्वाहा। क्लीं — शिखा को वषट्। चामुण्डायै — कवच को हुम्। विच्चे — तीन नेत्रों को वौषट्। ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे — अस्त्र को फट्।

ध्यान: खड्ग, चक्र, गदा, बाण, धनुष, परिघ, शूल, भुशुण्डी, शिर, शंख हाथों में धारण करती, त्रिनयना, सर्वांग-भूषा से ढकी, नीलमणि-कान्ति, दस मुख और दस पैरों वाली महाकालिका की सेवा करता हूँ — जिनकी स्तुति ब्रह्मा ने मधु-कैटभ वध हेतु की जब हरि सोये थे।

अक्षमाला, परशु, गदा, इषु, कुलिश, पद्म, धनुष, कुण्डिका, दण्ड, शक्ति, असि, चर्म, कमल, घण्टा, सुराभाजन, शूल, पाश, सुदर्शन हाथों में धारण करती, प्रसन्नानना, कमलस्थित, महिषासुरमर्दिनी महालक्ष्मी की सेवा करता हूँ।

घण्टा, शूल, हल, शंख, मुसल, चक्र, धनुष, बाण करकमलों में धारण करती, मेघान्त-चन्द्र-प्रभा, गौरी-देह से उद्भूत, त्रिजगत्-आधारभूत, शुम्भादि दैत्यों को मारने वाली महापूर्वा सरस्वती को भजता हूँ।

जप विधि: प्रातःकाल स्नान करके शुद्ध होकर, पूर्व या उत्तर दिशा की ओर मुख करके, कुश-आसन या ऊन-आसन पर बैठकर, स्फटिक या रुद्राक्ष माला से जप करें। न्यूनतम एक बार १०८ जप करें। नवरात्र में प्रतिदिन ९ माला (९७२) जप विशेष फलदायक है।

viniyog.shloka: अस्य श्रीnavarnamantravidhanaमन्त्रस्य ब्रह्मा-विष्णु-रुद्र ऋषिः। गायत्री-उष्णिक्-अनुष्टुप् छन्दः। श्री महाकाली-महालक्ष्मी-महासरस्वती (चामुण्डा) देवता। ऐं बीजम्। ह्रीं शक्तिः। क्लीं कीलकम्। श्रीमहाकाली-महालक्ष्मी-महासरस्वतीप्रीत्यर्थे जपे विनियोगः॥

benefits: The Navarna (nine-syllable) Mantra is the Mula Mantra of the entire Durga Saptashati
Invokes the triple Goddess — Mahakali, Mahalakshmi, Mahasaraswati simultaneously
Complete procedure with Viniyoga, Nyasa, Dhyana, and Japa Vidhi included
Most powerful mantra for Navratri worship — 972 repetitions daily for supreme results
Each Beeja syllable (Aim, Hreem, Kleem) activates Knowledge, Power, and Desire respectively
Essential foundation for all Durga Saptashati recitation
Invokes the combined blessings of all three supreme goddesses
description: Navarna Mantra Vidhana — नवार्ण मन्त्र विधान — is a sacred prayer offered to Goddess Durga. Attributed to Durga Saptashati (Markandeya Purana), this prayer holds a special place in Hindu devotional literature. Devotees recite this prayer to grant the combined blessings of all three supreme Goddesses and complete procedure with Viniyoga, Nyasa, Dhyana, and Japa Vidhi included. It is also said to invoke the triple Goddess — Mahakali, Mahalakshmi, Mahasaraswati simultaneously. This sacred text is ideally recited on Tuesday (Mangalvar) and Friday (Shukravar) and during Navratri, Durga Puja, and Chaitra Navratri for enhanced blessings. The text contains 10 verses and takes around 8 minutes to recite, fitting conveniently into a daily spiritual routine. On this page, you can read the complete Navarna Mantra Vidhana in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.

Navarna Mantra recitation rules sphatika rudraksha mala

Navarna Mantra Chamunda Devi nine syllables meaning

seoFaqs.question: What is the Navarna Mantra Vidhana?
seoFaqs.answer: The Navarna Mantra Vidhana (श्री नवार्ण मन्त्र विधान) is the complete ritual paddhati (procedural manual) for the proper recitation, japa and worship of the supreme Navarna mantra Om Aim Hrim Klim Chamundayai Vichche — the foundational nine-syllable mantra of the Devi Mahatmya / Durga Saptashati and the entire Shakta Tantric tradition. The 'vidhana' includes the full ritual sequence: viniyoga (declaration of rishi, chhand and devata), rishyadi nyasa (placement of the rishi-chhand-devata on the body), karanyasa (placement of bijas on the fingers), hridayadi nyasa (placement on heart, head, shikha, kavach, eyes and astra), the threefold dhyana of Mahakali-Mahalakshmi-Mahasaraswati, japa-vidhi (japa procedure with rules of timing, direction, posture, mala selection, count), and Navratri purashcharana procedure. Without this vidhana, the Navarna mantra is considered incomplete and unfruitful — the vidhana is the indispensable container that activates the mantra. (Source: Devi Mahatmya / Durga Saptashati upasana paddhati.)

seoFaqs.question: What is the Navarna mantra and why is it called Navarna?
seoFaqs.answer: The Navarna mantra is Om Aim Hrim Klim Chamundayai Vichche — the supreme bija mantra of Goddess Chamunda Chandika and the heart-mantra of the entire Devi Mahatmya / Durga Saptashati. The name 'Navarna' literally means 'nine-syllable' (nava = nine, akshara/arna = syllable) — excluding the pranava Om, the mantra has exactly nine aksharas: Aim-Hrim-Klim-Cha-mun-da-yai-Vich-che. Each bija is a complete shakti-meditation: Om is the pranava, the Brahman-pranava that opens every mantra. Aim is the Sarasvati / vak-tattva bija invoking creation (srishti) and Mahasaraswati. Hrim is the Mahalakshmi / hridaya-tattva bija invoking preservation (sthiti) and Mahalakshmi. Klim is the Mahakali / kama-tattva bija invoking dissolution (laya) and Mahakali. 'Chamundayai' invokes the supreme wrathful Mahakali form (Chamunda = slayer of Chanda and Munda). 'Vichche' means 'kindly grant abhaya / fulfil the requested siddhi'. Together the nine syllables encode the complete cosmic Devi-tattva. (Source: Devi Mahatmya tradition; Mantra Mahodadhi.)

seoFaqs.question: What is the viniyoga and nyasa procedure for the Navarna mantra?
seoFaqs.answer: The viniyoga declares: rishis are Brahma, Vishnu and Rudra (because the three faces of the Saptashati are revealed by the three); chhandas are Gayatri, Ushnik and Anushtup (matching the three charitras of Devi); devatas are Mahalakshmi, Mahasaraswati and Mahakali; bija is Aim; shakti is Hrim; kilaka is Klim; and the recitation is for Mahalakshmi-prityartha (to please Mahalakshmi). Then rishyadi nyasa is performed: Brahma-Vishnu-Rudra rishibhyo namah on the head, Gayatri-Ushnik-Anushtup chhandobhyo namah on the mouth, the three Mahadevis on the heart, Aim bija on the secret place, Hrim shakti on the feet, Klim kilaka on the navel. Karanyasa: Aim on thumbs, Hrim on index fingers, Klim on middle fingers, Cha on ring fingers, Mum on little fingers, Da on the palms and back of palms. Hridayadi nyasa: Aim on heart (hridayaya namah), Hrim on head (shirase svaha), Klim on shikha (vashat), Chamundayai on kavach (hum), Vichche on the three eyes (vaushat), and the full mantra on the astra (phat). (Source: Navarna Mantra Vidhana paddhati.)

seoFaqs.question: What is the proper japa procedure (japa-vidhi) for the Navarna mantra?
seoFaqs.answer: The Navarna japa-vidhi prescribes: (1) Time — pratahkale (early morning, ideally Brahma-muhurta) after a bath and shuddhi (purification), (2) Direction — facing east (purvabhimukha) or north (uttarabhimukha) — never south, (3) Asana — kushasana (kusha-grass mat) or oorṇasana (woollen mat), never directly on the floor, (4) Mala — sphatika-mala (crystal — for prosperity and Mahalakshmi aspect) or rudraksha-mala (for Mahakali aspect) of 108 beads, (5) Count — minimum 108 japa per session; for special purashcharana 1,008 daily; for full Navarna purashcharana 9 lakh japa over 9 months; during Navratri 9 × 108 = 972 daily, (6) Method — keep the mala in a gomukhi-bag (covered cow-face cloth bag) so others cannot see; cross only the meru-bead's other side and reverse direction; do not touch with the index finger (use thumb-and-middle finger only), (7) Concentration — visualize the dhyana of Mahakali (in Prathama Charitra), Mahalakshmi (in Madhyama), Mahasaraswati (in Uttama) according to the day, (8) After japa — close with arpana to Devi: Guhyati-guhya-goptri tvam grihana-asmat-kritam japam, siddhir bhavatu me Devi tvat-prasadan Maheshwari. (Source: Navarna Mantra Vidhana japa-vidhi.)

seoFaqs.question: What is the significance of the dhyana of three Mahadevis in the vidhana?
seoFaqs.answer: The Navarna Mantra Vidhana includes the threefold dhyana of Mahakali, Mahalakshmi and Mahasaraswati because these three are the presiding devatas of the three Devi-charitras of the Saptashati and the three primary svarupas of Devi corresponding to the three gunas (tamas, rajas, sattva) and the three cosmic functions (samhara, sthithi, srishti). The first dhyana is of Mahakali — ten-faced, ten-footed, blue-as-sapphire, holding sword, chakra, gada, arrow, bow, parigha, shula, bhushundi, severed head and shankha — invoked for the Prathama Charitra and tamas-overcoming. The second dhyana is of Mahalakshmi — eighteen-armed, coral-hued, holding aksha-mala, parashu, gada, arrow, vajra, lotus, bow, kamandalu, danda, shakti, sword, shield, conch, bell, wine-vessel, shula, pasha and Sudarshana — invoked for the Madhyama Charitra and rajas-balancing. The third dhyana is of Mahasaraswati — eight-armed, moon-bright, born from Gauri's body, holding bell, shula, plough, conch, musala, chakra, bow, arrow — invoked for the Uttama Charitra and sattva-flowering. Reciting all three dhyanas ensures the complete Devi-tattva is invoked. (Source: Navarna Mantra Vidhana dhyana sequence.)

seoFaqs.question: When and why is the Navarna Mantra Vidhana performed?
seoFaqs.answer: The Navarna Mantra Vidhana is performed daily by Devi-upasakas year-round, but with special intensity during all nine days of Sharad Navratri and Chaitra Navratri (with 9 × 108 = 972 japa daily as prescribed in the vidhana for visheshaphala), during the two minor Gupta Navratras (Magha and Ashadha) for Tantric sadhana, on Maha Ashtami and Maha Navami, on every Ashtami, Navami and Chaturdashi, on Tuesday and Friday which are sacred to Devi, on solar/lunar eclipses (most powerful for siddhi), on the death anniversary of an enemy for shatru-nashana, and during personal crisis periods for protection. A complete purashcharana of 9 lakh japa unlocks Mahalakshmi-Mahasaraswati-Mahakali tri-shakti siddhi. The vidhana is also the foundational opening of every Sata-Chandi (108 Saptashati paaths) and Sahasra-Chandi (1008 Saptashati paaths) maha-yajna. The Navarna is considered the master mantra for all Devi sadhana — every Devi mantra-puja begins with Navarna invocation through this vidhana. (Sources: Devi Mahatmya paath vidhi; Devi upasana corpus.)
